subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-05-19
subcodes.first_line: All the Bahá'í books are being preserved in boxes and in these days I have no inclination of opening them. In former years month after month I worked from sunrise till midnight
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
